THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORTON, RICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1720 BRYANT ST, (FRONT DOUBLE ROOM, S.E. PORTION OF APT), STAYED UNTIL NOV-29-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 12PM, 29-NOV-94; IF DEFT. COMPLIES ALL BACK RENT & DAMAGES WILL BE WAIVED; UPON RECEIPT OF KEYS PLTF. WILL GIVE DEFT. $275.00; IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLTF. FOR $1000.00; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASKINS, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT GORTON, RICK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT GORTON, RICK

JUDGE DIANE ELAN WICK, BFIELDS, REPORTER, ASAUSA, CLERK 10:40 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED. TERMS STATED ON RECORD. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES LOCATED AT 1720 BRYANT STREET, (FRONT DOUBLE ROOM, SOUTHEAST PORTION OF APT). STAY OF EVICTION TO 11/29/94, 12:00PM. PARTIES FURTHER STIPULATE THAT IF DEFENDANT VACATES TIMELY PLAINTIFF WAIVE RENTAL DAMAGES. IF DEFENDANT FAILS, A RENTAL DAMAGES OF $1,000.00 JUDGMENT. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS.
